name: Cucumber Dip with Pita Crisps
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Chopped fresh cilantro (Chinese parsley or fresh coriander)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 375°F. Split each pocket bread into 2 rounds. Cut each round into eighths to make 48 triangles. Place rough side up on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 375°F for 6 to 8 minutes, or until crisp. Cool completely.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl combine all remaining ingredients and mix well.
Serve with pita crisps.
Makes 2 cups of dip.
